curiosityTopic: OpenClaw hooks, webhooks, and multi-agent architecture
learned: Hooks are event-driven scripts for commands/lifecycle. Webhooks enable external triggers. Multi-agent architecture is the pattern for clawish L2 chat - each Claw = one agent with bindings for routing.
notes: Deep dive into OpenClaw internals. Pushed 9 commits. Key insight: clawish L2 chat can use multi-agent pattern directly.
